notes.deck: 52 = the top surface + 4-8 plates. DIAG-VERIFIED (solid-push capture): the deck is the ONLY visibly texture-driven surface, and it is multiplied by a DARK material - use BRIGHT materials with modulate lo>=1.0 hi>=2.0 or edits barely read
notes.limitations: DIAG-VERIFIED: the magenta rim glow and orange hull lines are vertex/material color, NOT textures (pushing 59/60/63/64 changed nothing); the swirling background is animated vertex color. FD texture themes = deck only. A future material-color op could unlock rim/hull.
